results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Latent KV serves as shared large head interacting with all query heads IS the shared drone-reference embedding for multi-head triplet synchronization.
Dual-channel attention with differentiated retrieval/streaming head roles + persistent attention sink IS the drone-head/melody-head role differentiation with persistent reference.

results.matched_effect_cluster: MLA Enabling Any Architecture Shared Latent

Comprehensive survey of attention head specialization roles (coherence, fact, rule, retrieval heads) covers head-role differentiation paradigm including drone+melody differentiation.
